mapper.select: SELECT store_id AS storeId, brand_code AS brandCode, name AS name, store_code AS storeCode, type AS type, owner_id AS ownerId, owner_name AS ownerName, owner_email AS ownerEmail, owner_contact AS ownerContact, owner_username AS ownerUsername FROM v_store_management WHERE store_id = #{storeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stores (name, store_code, type, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{storeCode}, #{type}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM stores WHERE store_code = #{storeCode}
